docs/architecture/overview.md:114:- YPI Studio UI prototype gate is a workflow/prompt/checker invariant: if a task changes pages, adds frontend functionality, changes existing interactions, changes approval/confirmation experience, or changes user-visible information structure, the architect must dispatch the UI designer to produce an HTML prototype based on the existing project and request user approval before implementation. `ui.md` may carry the HTML prototype or link to a `.html` file, but pure Markdown cannot satisfy the gate; checker treats missing HTML prototype or approval record as blocking.
docs/modules/library.md:54:| `lib/ypi-studio-workflows.ts` | Project-local YPI Studio structured workflow reader/initializer for `.ypi/workflows/`, including default workflow state machines, trigger metadata, transitions, progress states, UI prototype gate instructions for feature/bugfix planning, required `ui.md` for UI-change approval, non-overwriting backfill, and re-exports of pure workflow flow helpers. |
docs/modules/library.md:63:| `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` | Built-in Pi extension factory loaded by `lib/rpc-manager.ts`; injects YPI Studio workflow state, UI prototype gate reminders, implementation subtask guidance, and bounded `.ypi/knowledge` summaries, exports the Studio slash-command catalog, registers `/studio-init`, `/studio-start`, `/studio-feature`, `/studio-bugfix`, `/studio-ui`, `/studio-continue`, `/studio-check`, `/studio-archive`, exports `ypi_studio_task` and `ypi_studio_subagent`, records explicit user approval grants while a task is in `awaiting_approval`, supports `update_implementation_plan` / `implementation_next` / `claim_implementation_subtask` / `update_implementation_subtask`, returns compact `ypi_studio_task current/get` tool payloads by default (artifact paths, recent 10 events plus total count, subtask/run summaries, and next action hints) and treats `detail="full"` as a context-safe summary-plus-file-paths request instead of injecting complete task JSON, keeps synchronous `ypi_studio_subagent` details compact by embedding task summaries and bounded run projections instead of full task documents/events/transcripts, returns `ypi_studio_subagent(action=start, mode=async)` as a lightweight start confirmation (`ypi_studio_subagent_async_start_v1`) with only task identity, run identity/member/model/thinking/startedAt, a tiny starting progress object, warnings, and an explicit `ypi_studio_wait` hint, suppresses async child progress from continuing to update the original start tool while persistence still writes task state/transcript sidecars/runtime registry for wait and APIs, returns `poll`/`collect`/`cancel` through lightweight lifecycle projections (`ypi_studio_subagent_lifecycle_v1`) with task identity plus short run status/summary/error/transcript metadata and no task compact, events, implementation projection, transcript preview, or progress item preview, keeps `ypi_studio_wait` even smaller with only task identity plus per-run `id`/`runId`, task key, status, subtask title, phase/current tool, token speed, timestamps, and short terminal summary/error fields, provides `ypi_studio_wait` as the preferred long-running tool for waiting on async child runs and streaming progress back to the main chat, defines the compatible `ypi_studio_subagent` action/mode/runId contract for async `start/poll/collect/cancel` while defaulting omitted action/mode to current synchronous behavior, binds member runs to optional `subtaskId`, prefers stable `pi_<sessionId>` context keys before process fallbacks while still allowing runtime pointer recovery for process fallback contexts, resolves Studio member model/thinking policy through `lib/ypi-studio-policy.ts`, starts child Pi with separated `--model`/`--thinking` args and Trellis child-disable env, parses child stdout as JSONL into safe progress/final projections without retaining or surfacing raw stdout/stderr, ignores non-text deltas such as tool-call/thinking updates for parent output, enforces line/stderr/idle/runtime limits with process-group cancellation, streams Studio member child progress with `phase`, token/tps estimates, current tool, policy diagnostics, warnings, and transcript previews through `onUpdate` only for synchronous starts, records transcript sidecars, promotes blocking child extension UI requests to `waiting_for_user` tool results, and adds `YPI_STUDIO_CONTEXT_ID` to bash commands for runtime task binding. |
docs/modules/api.md:44:| `models/` | GET | List available models and default model; each `modelList` item includes provider id and optional provider display name for shared model selector grouping/search. |
docs/modules/frontend.md:7:| `components/AppShell.tsx` | Top-level layout, URL state, active Project Registry space context, browser tab title that prefers `Project(Space)` when project/space ids match (falling back to normalized workspace path and then cwd/Git title), tab management, Web Terminal bottom-dock toggling, resizable left drawer, right drawer mode switching between files and optional Trellis tasks, Trellis-task-to-chat context block insertion, session-scoped Studio widget polling that stays fast while implementation subtasks are running/waiting/need attention, debounced Studio tool-driven session-list refresh so newly-created child audit sessions and wait/status changes appear in the sidebar without global polling, and compact top-bar usage chips whose tooltip can show current-chat-plus-Studio-child rollup scope and own/child cost split. |
docs/modules/frontend.md:8:| `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` | Project Registry-driven project/space tree sidebar. It loads projects from `/api/projects` instead of synthesizing them from sessions, lazy-loads linked sessions for the selected project space, hides YPI Studio child audit sessions from ordinary root history by default while showing them as nested Studio audit rows under visible parents, shows exact-cwd legacy unassigned sessions separately, registers new project paths from manual input or the local OS directory picker, treats duplicate registrations as non-switching “already exists” notices so add actions do not masquerade as project switching, provides minimal project/space metadata editing for display name, tags, pinned, and archive state, keeps WorkTree actions available for worktree spaces, and includes archive/unarchive actions plus the integrated file explorer with a resizable session/explorer split. Main spaces without a custom display name render as `主空间` while keeping `spaceId: "main"`; the selected space header subtitle shows `空间：...` plus the current Git branch or WorkTree branch/base status, appends path-missing state when needed, and keeps full path/status details in the hover/focus tooltip. WorkTree badges remain compact (`WT` plus branch) with a tooltip for branch and base/unknown state. |
docs/modules/frontend.md:11:| `components/ChatInput.tsx` | Input bar, model dropdown, thinking level, tool preset, image upload, Browser Share binding entry, file-reference chips, slash-command autocomplete for extension commands/skills/prompt templates, and serialized Trellis task context blocks. The shared model dropdown keeps `provider/modelId` values unchanged while searching by model, provider id, and provider display name. New empty sessions receive the default tool preset and thinking level from `pi-web.json` (`yolk.defaultToolPreset`, `yolk.defaultThinkingLevel`) and can still be changed per session from the compact dropdowns; Browser Share can request a draft session before the first prompt; default/full/subagent presets include the built-in YPI Studio task tool, and the subagent preset also includes Studio member delegation. |
docs/modules/frontend.md:13:| `components/ModelSelect.tsx` | Shared searchable model selector used by chat and settings model policy fields, with grouped options and fuzzy jump/subsequence search across model labels, provider ids, and provider display names. |
